title: Syracuse Veo rental guide: How to use e-bikes and scooters if you’re car-free
summary: Article provides guidance on using Veo e-bikes and scooters as car-free transportation alternatives in Syracuse. Positions micromobility as a viable transit option in the city, addressing the region's car-centric infrastructure patterns.
